headline: Wells Fargo, Evercore ISI Trim Extra Space Storage (EXR) Targets Ahead of Q1
summary: Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE:EXR) is included among the 10 Fastest Growing Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. On April 16, Wells Fargo lowered its price recommendation on Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE:EXR) to $148 from $150. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm said it is becoming more cautious on storage REITs […]
